tool_args: SELECT date_hst, station_id, name, rainfall_mm FROM mv_daily_station_summary JOIN mesonet_stations WHERE station_id IN Manoa-area AND rainfall_mm > 50 ORDER BY rainfall_mm DESC LIMIT 30
tool_result_summary: Top events: Mar 13 2026 (198mm Lyon, 218mm Kalawahine), Jan 26 2025 (195mm Lyon, 184mm Kalawahine), Oct 26 2024 (155mm Kalawahine)

tool_args: SELECT day, avg_vwc FROM mesonet_measurements WHERE station_id='0501' AND var_id='SM_1_Avg' AND timestamp around 2026-03-08 to 2026-03-16
tool_result_summary: Soil moisture pre-March 13: 64% VWC (saturated from prior rain days). Peaked at 66.2% on Mar 14.

tool_args: Same soil moisture query for Jan 21-30, 2025
tool_result_summary: Pre-Jan 26 soil: 45.7% VWC (much drier). Jumped to 59.7% after the rain — ground absorbed significant water.

tool_args: Multi-day rainfall context: Lyon Arboretum daily totals Mar 10-15 2026 and Jan 23-28 2025
tool_result_summary: Mar 2026: 376mm over 4 days (multi-day event). Jan 2025: 218mm concentrated in 1 day.

tool_args: Peak hourly intensity at Lyon Arboretum for both events
tool_result_summary: Mar 13: 16.8mm/hr sustained over 5+ hours. Jan 26: 14.7mm/hr concentrated in 1 hour.
All 10 Oahu stations exceeded 100mm. Kaala summit hit 357mm. Entire watershed drenched simultaneously.
